description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, boxy design with a matte black finish. The front panel is dominated by three large, circular speaker grilles, each slightly recessed and subtly textured, suggesting a powerful multi-driver setup. The top, sides, and rear are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction appears robust, likely utilizing a combination of wood or MDF for the main body and metal mesh for the speaker grilles. There are no visible control panels, ports, or branding on any side, reinforcing the clean, monolithic appearance. The object is sizable, resembling a high-end home or studio audio component suitable for placement in urban environments such as living rooms, entertainment spaces, or public venues.
description: A large, rectangular black stereo sound system with three prominent circular speaker grilles on the front and a minimalist, unadorned exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large, circular speaker grilles evenly spaced across the face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a flat, featureless black panel with no visible controls or ports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, uninterrupted black surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain black panel.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Three large, circular grilles with a fine, uniform mesh texture and subtle concentric ring pattern.
